name: marketing
description: Unified growth surface: build-in-public (watch milestones, draft content), social posting (caption + schedule + publish), X/Twitter delivery, and press/creator outreach. Replaces the four separate build-in-public/social-posting/x-posting/outreach plugins; existing /bip /social /x /outreach routes and tool names are preserved.
author: SoftBacon Software

default_project.label: Default Project
default_project.description: Project ID for tracking posts (e.g. mycelium)
